title: Heulandite's Flowers
description: A resource pack for minecraft 1.20.4, that alters 16 of the ingame flowers, to be fuller, and more pretty when used in fields!
body:
A resource pack for minecraft 1.20.4, that alters 16 of the ingame flowers, to be fuller, and more pretty when used in fields. 
The flowers are vanilla-like and aim to improve upon the vanilla flowers of minecraft, by slightly altering some textures, and completely re-texturing others. I made this resource pack mainly, to make the default flowers look better in flower fields, however, I also tried my best to make sure they look good both on their own, and within flower pots. 

Currently this resource pack is only available in 1.20.4, but if you'd like to see other versions, let me know. 

The flowers changed in the current version of this resource pack are:
-allium
-red tulip
-pink tulip
-orange tulip
-white tulip
-wither rose
-rose bush
-peony bush
-sunflower
-lilac bush
-dandelion
-poppy
-azure bluet
-blue orchid
-oxeye daisy
-cornflower
